pr.title: GolfStudent v2 14L: d=352, Value Residuals, GPTQ-lite, Schedule-Free, Muon+EMA

output.summary: 14-layer GatedMLP/attention hybrid (d=352) adds value-residual skip gates, Muon+EMA, GPTQ-lite quantization, and a schedule-free final stage.
techniques: 14-layer hybrid of GatedMLP recurrence and sparse attention
Value-residual scalar skip gates with Muon optimizer and EMA
GPTQ-lite per-row INT8 quantization plus constant LR final 120s
